attributes.name: AsAthleteEnrollmentListener
attributes.description: Marks a service as a subscriber to enrollment lifecycle events. EnrollmentAtomicityFailed requires explicit opt-in (it routes on notifications-critical queue and is P1).

params.name: events
params.description: Empty = subscribe to every Academorix\Sports\AthleteEnrollment\Events\Enrollment* event EXCEPT EnrollmentAtomicityFailed (explicit opt-in required).
